publishedAbstract: + PVC capacity is not updating after resizing of a statically provisioned Volumes, with below error: ~~~ InvalidArgument desc = GetFileShareInfo(demo-ns-azstorage-pv) failed with error: error parsing volume id: \"demo-ns-azstorage-pv\", should at least contain two #" ~~~ + When editing the current PV yaml to update the volumeHandle, it throws Volumehandle are immutable error: ~~~ The PersistentVolume "demo-volume" is invalid: spec.persistentvolumesource: Forbinnddn: spec.persistentvolumesource is immutable after creation ~~~
publishedTitle: PVC Capacity Not Updating After Statically Provisioned Volume Resizing
